subcodes.first_line: O thou who art inebriated with the wine of divine favor! In truth, whatsoever grievance thou mayest express, and even shouldst thou voice complaint, justice resteth with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام عنایت فی الحقیقه آنچه گله نمااید حتی اگر شکایت فرمااید حق با
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
